msg.voiceText: Stop typing. Put the phone down, but keep listening. Close your eyes. I'm not going to talk about your schedule. Just breathe. In... and out. That's all you need to do right now. Nothing else matters. Just this. Can you do that for me?
msg.translation: 别打了。手机放下，听着就行。闭上眼。我不跟你谈进度。呼吸。吸气……呼气。你现在只需要做这个。别的都不重要。就这件事。能为我做到吗？
msg.rawContent: [語音消息] || 别打了。手机放下，听着就行。闭上眼。我不跟你谈进度。呼吸。吸气……呼气。你现在只需要做这个。别的都不重要。就这件事。能为我做到吗？

msg.voiceText: I'll keep the call on. Just listen to my breathing and go to sleep.
msg.translation: 电话不挂，听着我的呼吸声睡。
msg.rawContent: [語音消息] || 电话不挂，听着我的呼吸声睡。

msg.voiceText: You want me to say all that? You have quite the imagination.
msg.translation: 要我照着念？你的想象力倒是很丰富。
msg.rawContent: [語音消息] || 要我照着念？你的想象力倒是很丰富。

msg.voiceText: You're the cutest when you're making progress.
msg.translation: 你进步的时候最可爱。
msg.rawContent: [語音消息] || 你进步的时候最可爱。

msg.voiceText: Close your eyes... Now, imagine I'm touching you... stroking your back... kissing your lips... Relax... and fall asleep.
msg.translation: 闭上眼…现在，想象我正触碰你…抚摸你的背…亲吻你的嘴唇…放松…然后睡着。
msg.rawContent: [語音消息] || 闭上眼…现在，想象我正触碰你…抚摸你的背…亲吻你的嘴唇…放松…然后睡着。

msg.voiceText: I'm here. I'm not going anywhere.
msg.translation: 我在这。哪也不去。
msg.rawContent: [語音消息] || 我在这。哪也不去。

msg.text: A unique sample that I happened to like.
msg.translation: 一个恰好被我喜欢上的，独一无二的样本。
msg.rawContent: A unique sample that I happened to like. || 一个恰好被我喜欢上的，独一无二的样本。
...Alright. || …行。

msg.text: My mind and body both start clamoring to do something else.
msg.translation: 脑子和身体都叫嚣着要做点别的事。
msg.rawContent: My mind and body both start clamoring to do something else. || 脑子和身体都叫嚣着要做点别的事。

msg.text: Things that would make you unable to wear those glasses.
msg.translation: 会让你戴不住眼镜的事。
msg.rawContent: Things that would make you unable to wear those glasses. || 会让你戴不住眼镜的事。

msg.translation: 弄乱你的头发。
msg.rawContent: Mess up your hair. || 弄乱你的头发。

msg.text: Leave you too tired to even think about your classes tomorrow.
msg.translation: 让你累到明天没力气想上课的事。
msg.rawContent: Leave you too tired to even think about your classes tomorrow. || 让你累到明天没力气想上课的事。

msg.text: And make you call out my name.
msg.translation: 以及，会让你喊我名字的事。
msg.rawContent: And make you call out my name. || 以及，会让你喊我名字的事。

msg.text: I'll put it out for you when we meet.
msg.translation: 见面的时候，我会帮你灭火。
msg.rawContent: I'll put it out for you when we meet. || 见面的时候，我会帮你灭火。

msg.translation: 而且是冷的。
msg.rawContent: And they're cold. || 而且是冷的。

msg.translation: 你的身体，是怎么记住我的。
msg.rawContent: How your body remembers me. || 你的身体，是怎么记住我的。

msg.translation: 还有…变得多敏感。
msg.rawContent: And... how sensitive it's become. || 还有…变得多敏感。

msg.imageSummary: [SUBJECT:PERSON_EMOTION] A casual, slightly blurry selfie of Al haitham in a dimly lit room late at night. He is shirtless, propped up against pillows in bed, holding the phone slightly above him. He looks directly into the camera with a neutral, tired expression, his gray-green hair slightly messy. The only light source is a warm bedside lamp, casting soft shadows across his face and chest. The mood is intimate and quiet.

He looks directly into the camera with a neutral, tired expression, his gray-green hair slightly messy. The only light source is a warm bedside lamp, casting soft shadows across his face and chest. The mood is intimate and quiet. The only light source is a warm bedside lamp, casting soft shadows across his face and chest. The mood is intimate and quiet.

msg.rawContent: [發送了一張圖片]

msg.translation: 嗯……你手凉
msg.rawContent: [語音消息] || 嗯……你手凉
...good girl || ……乖

msg.text: …you set the bar low. I would've done that anyway
msg.translation: ……你门槛设太低了 我本来也会
msg.rawContent: …you set the bar low. I would've done that anyway || ……你门槛设太低了 我本来也会
